title: File Management Flow

get_file: Files → Ai::fakeableFileProvider(?provider)  [Ai is Laravel Facade → AiManager]
AiManager checks filesAreFaked(): if true → clone provider, provider::useFileGateway(fakeFileGateway)
FileGateway returns FileResponse → Files returns FileResponse to Client
put_file: Files normalizes input: string → Base64Document(base64_encode, mimeType)->as(name)
Files normalizes input: UploadedFile → Base64Document::fromUpload(file)->as(name ?? originalName)
put_from_path: Files → static::put(Document::fromPath(path), mimeType, name, provider) [delegates to put flow]
put_from_storage: Files → static::put(Document::fromStorage(path, disk), name: name, provider: provider) [delegates to put flow]
fake_setup: FakeFileGateway::putFile() → returns StoredFileResponse with fakeId = 'fake_file_' + md5(name)
FakeFileGateway::getFile() → returns FileResponse with fake-content or configured response

key_relationships: Files static facade depends_on Ai (Laravel Facade for AiManager)
AiManager extends MultipleInstanceManager, uses InteractsWithFakeFiles trait
AiManager::fakeableFileProvider() returns FileProvider (real or with fake gateway injected)
FileProvider interface defines: getFile(), putFile(), deleteFile(), fileGateway(), useFileGateway()
Provider classes implement FileProvider via ManagesFiles trait
ManagesFiles trait delegates to FileGateway for all operations
FileGateway interface implemented by real provider gateways (OpenAiGateway, etc.) or FakeFileGateway
FakeFileGateway implements FileGateway — returns preset/generated responses without HTTP calls
ManagesFiles dispatches events: StoringFile (before), FileStored (after put), FileDeleted (after delete)

AiManager: fileProvider(?string $name): FileProvider  // throws LogicException if not FileProvider
fakeableFileProvider(?string $name): FileProvider  // swaps in FakeFileGateway if faked

events_dispatched: StoringFile(invocationId, provider, file) — before putFile gateway call
FileStored(invocationId, provider, file, StoredFileResponse) — after putFile gateway call
FileDeleted(invocationId, provider, fileId) — after deleteFile gateway call
file_input_normalization: Document::fromStorage(path, disk) — wraps Laravel Storage file
important_notes: Files is a static facade class in namespace Laravel\Ai. All operations route through Ai (Facade→AiManager) to get a FileProvider (validated by instanceof check). The fake mechanism: AiManager holds a FakeFileGateway; fakeableFileProvider() injects it into a cloned provider via useFileGateway(). Recording of uploads/deletions happens in ManagesFiles trait by calling Ai::recordFileUpload/recordFileDeletion on the AiManager singleton. Provider drivers supported: openai, anthropic, gemini, azure, groq, mistral, etc.
